description: Icon-only square button sharing Button's variant/intent/size system. Renders a single icon in a square container with identical color tokens, state overlays, and disabled behavior as Button.

icon.description: Required. The icon to display. Sized internally per size variant.

aria-label.description: Required. Accessibility label for the icon-only button.

variant.description: Visual variant. Shares Button's color token system.

intent.description: Color intent. Shares Button's intent token system.

size.description: Size variant. Controls square container size and icon size.

shape.description: Shape. default = size-mapped radius, pill = circle (9999px), square = sharp (0px).

asChild.description: Radix Slot — renders child element while forwarding all styles and props.

loading.description: Shows centered spinner, hides icon, disables interaction.

disabled.description: Inactive state. Prevents interaction via aria-disabled + event prevention.

variant_x_intent.description: Shares all 12 variant x intent color combinations with Button. See button.json for full token mapping.

disabled.description: Shares all 12 disabled class combinations with Button. See button.json for full token mapping.

loading.description: Icon marked invisible, Spinner absolutely centered. pointer-events-none + aria-busy=true. Disabled classes NOT applied during loading.

implementation.stateOverlay: Identical to Button: absolute <span> with group-hover/group-active. Root has 'group relative'.
implementation.loadingStrategy: Icon span gets 'invisible'. Spinner absolutely centered. Uses motion-essential class.
implementation.tokenReuse: Reuses all --comp-button-* color tokens. Only has its own --comp-icon-button-size-{size} for square container dimensions.
implementation.typeImportReuse: Types (IconButtonVariant, IconButtonIntent, IconButtonSize, IconButtonShape) are aliased from Button types.
implementation.noChildren: Omits 'children' from HTMLButtonElement attributes. Icon is the sole visual content.
implementation.typeDefault: Defaults to type='button' unless asChild is true.
